results.rendered_html:
gumph (= √guph) cl. 6. P. ˚phati ( Pāṇ. vii, 1, 59 ,  Kāś. ; ind.p. gumphitvā [ Pāṇ. i, 2, 23 ]  Bhaṭṭ. vii ),
to string together, tie or string as a garland,  Naiṣ. viii, 82  :
Caus. ˚phayati id.,  Kathās. lxxii, 79.
